description: Style Note This summer we bring to you a pair of flip-flops from barbie that your little princess will not want to take off! Featuring an attractive print and bead detailing on the straps, this pair is a unique blend of style and comfort. Team it with a frock and a matching hairband for a hot summer day. Product Details Pink flip-flops with multi-coloured print and branding on footbed Bead detail on thong style straps Horizontal grooves on outsole Material and Care Rubber Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store under sunlight  Style NoteThis summer we bring to you a pair of flip-flops from Barbie that your little princess will not want to take off!
